1.name: Prochlorococcus MED4 cluster 1 (1 genes)
1.functional_description: Contains the gene Yfr2-5_1, a small non-coding RNA potentially involved in regulatory functions during iron stress.
1.temporal_pattern: Expression changes begin early in the iron starvation time course and show dynamic regulation across the time points, including rescue.
1.assessment_notes: Limited specific functional annotation; small RNA regulatory role inferred.

13.name: Prochlorococcus MED4 cluster 13 (7 genes)
13.functional_description: Enriched for ABC transporter genes involved in transport functions under iron stress.
13.temporal_pattern: Genes in this cluster show differential expression starting early in iron starvation and respond dynamically through the time course and rescue.
13.assessment_notes: Transport function inferred from gene annotations; no explicit p-value reported.

16.name: Prochlorococcus MED4 cluster 16 (4 genes)
16.functional_description: Contains small non-coding RNAs Yfr2 and Yfr4, suggesting a regulatory role in iron stress response.
16.temporal_pattern: Expression changes occur during iron starvation and are reversed upon iron rescue, indicating dynamic regulation.
16.assessment_notes: Small RNA cluster with inferred regulatory function; no enrichment data.

19.name: Prochlorococcus MED4 cluster 19 (63 genes)
19.functional_description: Enriched for iron stress response genes including bcp, sigA/rpoD, crp, hli, iraI, idiA, isiB, and several small RNAs, indicating a coordinated iron stress regulon.
19.temporal_pattern: Genes are upregulated during iron starvation starting early and remain elevated until iron rescue, where expression decreases.
19.confidence_notes: Cluster includes many known iron stress genes and sRNAs, supporting functional assignment.

supporting_quotes.quote: 19: bcp, sigA/rpoD, crp, hli, iraI, idiA, isiB, Yfr20, asRNA_04601, asRNA_07401 (63)
MED4 genomic island 5 (ISL5), in particular, was a ‘hotspot’ for differentially expressed genes in our experiments—including high-light inducible (hli) genes, and numerous genes of unknown function.

19.assessment_notes: Strong evidence from gene content and expression pattern.

22.name: Prochlorococcus MED4 cluster 22 (1 genes)
22.confidence_notes: Cluster not discussed in the paper.
22.assessment_notes: No discussion or data provided for this cluster.

3.name: Prochlorococcus MED4 cluster 3 (15 genes)
3.functional_description: Contains hli genes and other genes related to photosystem components and stress response.
3.temporal_pattern: Genes show differential expression during iron starvation and recovery phases, with dynamic regulation.
3.assessment_notes: Functional annotation based on gene names; no enrichment statistics.

4.name: Prochlorococcus MED4 cluster 4 (1 genes)
4.confidence_notes: Cluster not discussed in the paper.
4.assessment_notes: No discussion or data provided for this cluster.

6.name: Prochlorococcus MED4 cluster 6 (2 genes)
6.functional_description: Contains petF, encoding ferredoxin, an iron-requiring electron transfer protein downregulated during iron stress.
6.temporal_pattern: Downregulated during iron starvation and upregulated upon iron rescue.
6.confidence_notes: Known iron response gene with clear expression pattern.

supporting_quotes.quote: ferredoxin was downregulated and flavodoxin was upregulated during iron stress in both MED4 and MIT9313

6.assessment_notes: Strong evidence from gene identity and expression.

7.name: Prochlorococcus MED4 cluster 7 (1 genes)
7.confidence_notes: Cluster not discussed in the paper.
7.assessment_notes: No discussion or data provided for this cluster.

9.name: Prochlorococcus MED4 cluster 9 (30 genes)
9.functional_description: Includes genes involved in sulfur metabolism (cysD), heme synthesis (hemA), dehydrogenases, and several small RNAs, indicating diverse metabolic functions during iron stress.
9.temporal_pattern: Genes show differential expression during iron starvation and recovery, with dynamic regulation.

supporting_quotes.quote: 9: cysD, hemA, dehydrogenase, Yfr16, Yfr19, Yfr8 (30)

9.assessment_notes: Functional annotation based on gene names; no enrichment statistics.
